rows.label: qev030501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thea... you haven't eaten a proper meal
again today, have you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0002
rows.name:
I understand how you feel, but times like this are exactly
when you need to treat your body well, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thanks, Auntie...
But I'm alright now, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sigh... Looking at you, what part of you is alright?
If you're alright, show me a beautiful dance
like you used to, won't you... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Oh? Are you a BLADE?
Did they finally send someone
to take our job, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0010
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the details of the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the depressed Thea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0006
rows.name:
I want you to go and mourn a warrior named Quega,
who was Thea's fiancé. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0007
rows.name:
He stayed behind to fight in the Valley of Oblivion
so everyone could escape the Growth... and he died, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0008
rows.name:
So, using the Bias method...
I want to feed his body to an extraordinary beast
and grant his soul peace. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Please, accept this request.
This is also to cheer Thea up. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0010
rows.name:
When we fled here,
her fiancé was killed by them, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Quega was a brave man.
He stayed in the Valley of Oblivion to fight so everyone could escape...
and he died protecting the woman he loved. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0012
rows.name:
So I at least wanted to give him a proper mourning,
which is why I sent a request to BLADE, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't know if they're short on people or what,
but they just wouldn't send anyone over. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0014
rows.name:
That's right... at this point, you'll do fine!
For the sake of cheering Thea up, too... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Could you go feed Quega's body
to a beast?
That is the Bias-style funeral. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Sigh... That helps a lot.
Those Cavern Clan idiots are still prowling around
the Valley of Oblivion, aren't they? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Because of that, we haven't been able to mourn him all this time,
and it's been weighing on my heart, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Auntie... are you going to return him
into a beast? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0019
rows.name:
That's right!
With this, Quega's soul will depart
for a new place. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0020
rows.name:
You can't stay depressed forever, either...
Won't you dance for us again like before, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0021
rows.name:
But... the person who watched me
is gone now...
I can't... dance anymore, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Sigh... Good grief...
This girl Thea is the best dancer among the Bias. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0023
rows.name:
In the past, she used to captivate all the men in the village
with her dancing...
But since then, she hasn't danced a single time, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Really... it's such a waste.
Say, wouldn't you like to see a beauty like her
dance too? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0031
rows.name: Show interest in Thea's dancing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0040
rows.name: Disinterest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0041
rows.name: Show no interest in Thea's dancing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Right, right?
Then, to help this girl get her dancing back,
I'm counting on you for Quega's mourning, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0026
rows.name:
How cold...
Are all BLADEs just
uncouth folks like you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Well, as long as you do the job properly,
it's fine, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0028
rows.name:
When you go to Quega's body
in the Ivica Desert in the Valley of Oblivion,
contact me first. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0029
rows.name: I'll teach you how to perform a Bias-style funeral then, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0030
rows.name:
Quega's body is in the Ivica Desert, na.
He held the Growth off there
and let us escape to this point. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Even though such a good woman was waiting for him...
Reckless and truly a foolish man, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Well, let's mourn him by feeding him
to an extraordinary beast worthy of a foolish man! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'm counting on you! Contact me first
once you find the body, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0034
rows.name:
Searching for the mysterious gift Quega left behind,
and mourning him... I'm sorry for asking so much of you, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0035
rows.name:
But it's all to cheer Thea up.
...Na? Please.
I just want to see Thea dance one more time. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Ah, [ST:playername ]!
Did Quega's mourning finish safely, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Is that right, he was eaten by a Garcas...
That's wonderful. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0038
rows.name:
Now all that's left is for you to retrieve the keepsake
Quega hid in the Dryland Cave Fortress.
I'm counting on you, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Ah, [ST:playername ]!
Did Quega's mourning finish safely, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Is that right, he was eaten by a Garcas...
That's wonderful. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0041
rows.name:
If he was eaten by such a strong beast,
Quega's soul will be able to return to the earth without hesitation. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Now for the keepsake Quega hid.
Were you able to find that, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: NewText_75
rows.name: ...Th... this is! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Hey, Thea! Look at this!
That idiot man... He left something like this for you
before facing the Growth... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Eh... this is...
A dancing costume, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0045
rows.name:
...When we were captured by the Growth...
He was secretly making something, saying he had
something he wanted to give me, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0046
rows.name: ...It was this, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Na? Quega isn't here anymore, but...
you understand what he wanted to convey at the end,
don't you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0049
rows.name: Good grief... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0050
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]...
You're the one who retrieved this,
so you tell this girl what it means. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0050
rows.name: Explain[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell her that he must have wanted her
to keep dancing forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_JNK0060
rows.name: Silence[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_SEL0061
rows.name:
Keep your mouth shut and
stare at Thea silently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0051
rows.name: Ah... aah! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0052
rows.name:
...Yes, I know, na.
After all, the person who understood him best
in the whole world... is me, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0053
rows.name:
That's right. The person who loved my dancing
more than anyone else... was him! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0054
rows.name:
And yet, I... ran away from dancing...
I was betraying him this whole time, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0055
rows.name: Thea... you... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0056
rows.name:
...I will be reborn, na...
Taking on the name of the beast that ate him... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0057
rows.name:
As Thea Garcas,
I will keep dancing until this soul burns out, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0058
rows.name:
Well said!
I've been waiting to hear those words all along, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0059
rows.name:
...Thank you!
Thanks to you, Thea is back on her feet, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030501_MSG0060
rows.name:
Please accept this reward.
And someday, come watch Thea dance! [ST:wait ]
